meta.title: Sofía Guzmán · Data Analyst
meta.description: Sofía Guzmán's portfolio, Data Analyst and Computer Science student focused on analytics, visualization, and data storytelling.
meta.ogDescription: Projects, experience, and contact information for Sofía Guzmán: Data Analyst, dashboards in Power BI and Tableau, focused on actionable insights.
meta.keywords: Sofía Guzmán, data analytics, power bi, tableau, portfolio, data analyst, buenos aires

home.title: Hi, I'm Sofi
home.subtitle: Computer Science Student (UBA)
home.quote: I aspire to connect and leave a meaningful mark on every project.

about.title: I build stories with data, without losing the human element.
about.note: データで物語を作る — create stories with data.
paragraphs: I'm Sofi. I went from watching my brother build PCs to building my own and discovering my place in data. Today I study Computer Engineering (UBA), blending my curiosity for hardware with the power of software.
interests: [strong]- Engineering and Logic:[/strong] I'm passionate about understanding how components interact to solve complex problems.
[strong]- Data Storytelling:[/strong] My background in music and marketing allows me to transform dashboards into clear stories that connect with people.

card.title: Currently
card.internshipSummary: I participated in the technical development of a logistics solution using [strong]Python[/strong] and [strong]n8n[/strong]. Following its initial success, we are currently scaling the project: refactoring the code for greater efficiency and designing a dedicated landing page to present our value proposition to the market.

skills.title: Tools I use to understand and tell data stories

cards.title: Internship · Fundacion Pescar - Artech
cards.summary: Final project in Data Analytics: cleaning, modeling, KPIs, and a dashboard for decision-making.

cards.title: Database · Course Project (SQL)
cards.summary: Modeling, data loading, and SQL queries to manage and analyze the database.

cards.title: Final Data Analytics Project · Power BI Dashboard
cards.summary: Power BI dashboard with modeling, DAX, and visualizations for data analysis.

cards.title: Final Excel Project: Processing and Dashboard
cards.summary: Data processing and analysis in Excel with advanced functions, validations, and dynamic dashboard.

cards.title: Personal Portfolio · City Pop Design
cards.summary: Interactive website built with React, Tailwind CSS, and I18n. Nostalgic-futuristic City Pop aesthetic featuring theme support and advanced 3D hover interactions.

experience.title: What I'm doing and what I've done

case.title: PIKI · Mail Tracking & Logistics
case.subtitle: Intelligent logistics query management — Group 6 Capstone Project
case.problem: Logistics operations were [strong]fragmented and slow[/strong], leading to a heavy operational burden on customer support due to constant shipping-related inquiries.
results: Reduced operational workload for the support team
Clear and immediate visibility of shipment statuses
Faster, more efficient, and scalable responses

bullets: Intensive practice in data cleaning, modeling, and presentation.
KPIs and dashboard focused on decision-making.
